Class AbstractDatagramTransportListener<E extends DatagramEndpoint>

java.lang.Object
org.apache.axis2.transport.base.AbstractTransportListener
org.apache.axis2.transport.base.AbstractTransportListenerEx<E>
org.apache.axis2.transport.base.datagram.AbstractDatagramTransportListener<E>
All Implemented Interfaces:
TransportListener
Direct Known Subclasses:
UDPListener
public abstract class AbstractDatagramTransportListener<E extends DatagramEndpoint> extends AbstractTransportListenerEx<E>

  • Method Details

    • doInit

      protected void doInit() throws AxisFault
      Description copied from class: AbstractTransportListenerEx
      Initialize the transport. This method will be called after the initialization work in AbstractTransportListener and before the first endpoint is created, i.e. before the first call to AbstractTransportListenerEx.createEndpoint().
      Specified by:
      doInit in class AbstractTransportListenerEx<E extends DatagramEndpoint>
      Throws:
      AxisFault
